coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 3-group, 170-node closure.
validation: Exact Blender topology and four-decimal bounds across fifteen cases covering pixelation (including the empty endpoint), crop with zero and rounded fillets, full-color mode, density/structure extremes, and HSV/contrast controls. Grid exposes Blender's point-domain UV field and Image Texture performs linear CLIP sampling of the packed queen-of-swords image. The authored img attribute average is within 0.0007 per RGB channel of Blender. The gallery now transfers img/dens/grid to an independently authored WebGL reconstruction of the extracted Mapping, Map Range, 3D F1 Voronoi, and Greater Than chain. A shader-rendered Blender reference or probe is still required before claiming Blender shader parity.
